subject: Re: Recommendation For My Neighbors !!!
body:
@anyone interested???

On Monday, November 10, 2025 at 6:11:48 AM UTC-8 Clare Trahan wrote:

> Hey neighbors, Eric is coming to my house to clean my Ducts and vent. I 
> had his service last year and was really happy with it. He is offering a 
> group discount Does anyone want to join the group rate? We need at least 5 
> people.
>
> The group rate is $199 Thanks!
>
> If you're Interested just send me your house address and contact number or 
> you can reach him at 786- 952-3671 <(786)%20952-3671> and he'll add you 
> to the list of interested once. Thanks!
